speaker: narrator
text: Tap the text to show or hide reading controls.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “There can be no defeat.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok spoke with cold eyes. The Southern Edge Sect’s disciples all nodded with tense expressions.

speaker: hyun jong
text: “I don’t want you to win the competition. If you can, that would be good, but if you cannot, it is just an unfortunate outcome. However, losing to Mount Hua is a different matter entirely.”

speaker: narrator
text: When the words ‘defeat’ and ‘Mount Hua’ were mentioned, Jong Seo-Han, who was in the corner, flinched. Jong Rigok glared at the poor child,

speaker: hyun jong
text: “It doesn’t matter if you lose to another sect. But you can’t lose to Mount Hua anymore. The audience will inflate the results and talk. If we lose to Mount Hua again, the Southern Edge Sect will be known as a sect that has fallen short of Mount Hua. And if we lose again, all we can do is just accept that. Can you endure that humiliation?”

speaker: narrator
text: Satisfied with Jin Geum-Ryong’s cold face, the sect leader took him at his word.

speaker: sect leader
text: “You, especially, cannot lose.”

speaker: sect leader
text: “I will remember that.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok’s gaze fell on Jin Geum-Ryong and Jin Cho-Baek.

speaker: sect leader
text: “… I know that will not happen. But make sure not to get swept away by your personal feelings.”

speaker: sect leader
text: “That will never happen. I will defeat them and restore the honor of the Southern Edge Sect.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jong Rigok nodded and looked at Lee Song-Baek.

speaker: sect leader
text: “Lee Song-Baek, you too.”

speaker: sect leader
text: “I do not expect much from you. But make sure not to lose.”

speaker: narrator
text: The expectations between the two seemed different. The others didn’t know why, but Lee Song-Baek knew. He was learning the old Southern Edge Sect martial arts, which meant many people had no expectations of him. It was strange, the situation of someone who could be considered the best. The situation of Lee Song-Baek. Yet he responded calmly,

speaker: sect leader
text: “I will not tarnish the reputation of the Southern Edge Sect.”

speaker: narrator
text: With that, Jong Rigok no longer looked at Lee Song-Baek,

speaker: sect leader
text: “Those who extol honor will be given a worthy reward, and those who bring dishonor will be punished for it. Prove yourselves and never bring shame onto the name of the Southern Edge Sect.”

speaker: sect leader
text: “We will keep that in mind, Sect Leader!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: ... Jong Rigok glanced over everyone one last time and then turned and left. The remaining disciples all let out sighs of relief at the same time. Lee Song-Baek, who was watching this from behind, closed his eyes. ‘How did all this happen?’ In the past, it wasn’t like this. But after only one defeat to Mount Hua in one conference, his sect had transformed into this… different one. Lee Song-Baek turned his head, Sama Seung, who led Southern Edge to the conference with Mount Hua in the past, was looking at him. After the devastating defeat, Sama Seung had a dull face as if he had aged ten years in one day. Wasn’t it said that the face was the window to the heart? Sama Seung was a strict and cold person, but he embraced his disciples. But now he felt foreign. Lee Song-Baek nodded and followed him. After leaving their residence and walking throUgh the forest for some time, Sama Seung looked at Lee Song-Baek after confirming no one was around them,

speaker: sect leader
text: “You must know who your opponent is.”

speaker: sect leader
text: “Mount Hua’s Divine Dragon”

speaker: sect leader
text: “Don’t speak of that cursed name in front of me.”

speaker: narrator
text: There was anger on his face. Chung Myung’s title was earned after he had defeated Southern Edge’s second-class disciples during the Southern Edge-Mount Hua conference. In other words, that title was earnt throUgh their humiliation.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Right, that Chung Myung is your opponent. Are you confident in defeating him?”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-baek didn’t answer. Win over Chung Myung?

speaker: chung myung
text: “…I will do my best.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “There is no need for such a short answer. Answer me. Are you confident?”

speaker: narrator
text: ... Lee Song-baek sighed, As if he got the answer he was looking for, the elder didn’t shout.

speaker: chung myung
text: “You might also know, but now there is no one in our sect who can stop him.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Not just you, but even Jin Geum-Ryong cannot. You know this, right?”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek answered in a low voice.

speaker: chung myung
text: “But we have to defeat him. No, winning is important, but he must also be killed.”

speaker: narrator
text: Sama Seung’s eyes were scary.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Mount Hua and us, when one rises, the other declines. Mount Hua rages, and Southern Edge falls. During our best day, Mount Hua was on the verge of dying. You know that?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “There is no use denying the truth. If you cannot accept reality, you cannot do anything.”

speaker: narrator
text: Sama Seung clenched his teeth,

speaker: chung myung
text: “You know it too. And now our sect is losing its force. After that damned conference, the light and life of our sect began to fade. On the other hand, Mount Hua is coming from the brink of collapse, recovering its strength. This is our reality.”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek bowed his eyes. Even if this was true, he didn’t understand why the elder called him out to say this. At that time, the elder looked into his eyes and said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “How far can you go for the sake of The Southern Edge Sect?!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “… what do you mean?!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I meant what I said. Would you be able to lay down your life for Southern Edge?!”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek looked at his elder and said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “To give up your honor for it?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Then can you lay down everything for Southern Edge? Even enduring years of humiliation?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “I will not hesitate.”

speaker: narrator
text: A smile formed on his lips, a weird sly smile.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Right. A Southern Edge disciple should be like this.”

speaker: narrator
text: Sama Seung shoved something out from his sleeve, a vial, Lee Song-Baek didn’t reach for it, so the elder shoved it to him.

speaker: chung myung
text: “You don’t need to know. Take it.”

speaker: narrator
text: Hesitating, Lee Song-Baek reached out for the vial and accepted it. Sama Seung looked at him and said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Before you go up to the stage, rub that onto your sword.”

speaker: narrator
text: He said so firmly, but his eyes were glistening weirdly.

speaker: chung myung
text: “A secret is better when few people know it. You don’t have to know what it is. If there is a problem and you are asked to answer, not knowing is better.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Didn’t I tell you?! Give up on knowing what it is.”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek bit his lip. He didn’t mind dying for the sake of his sect. But wasn’t that different from what was being asked of him now?!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Elder, poison doesn’t work on Mount Hua’s Divine Dragon. And to use poison in an official spar will bring dishonor to Southern…”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Did I say it was? No one will ever know. But it is something that can kill him. You just need to put that onto your sword and make sure to scratch his body with your sword.”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek looked at Sama Seung with a stiff face. ‘Is this what we have reached?!’ How could such ignorant moves come from the elders who once spoke of righteousness?! Sama Seung spoke coldly,

speaker: chung myung
text: ... “Are you going to disobey my orders?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “You cannot become Jin Geum-Ryong. You expect to move ahead, but you have taken the road to the back. If you really want to repay the favor we are showing you, don’t hesitate to jump into shit.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “You aren’t thinking about betraying those who raised and taUght you, right?”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek’s eyes were wide.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Do what you are told. Everything will work out.”

speaker: narrator
text: Just as Lee Song-Baek was about to say something,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Will that be the solution?”

speaker: narrator
text: A cold voice came from behind. The two turned back in shock to see a familiar face.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Jin-Jin Geum-Ryong!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: He approached them with a cold expression, almost as if his face was made from plates of armor, and reached out to Lee Song-Baek.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Did you not hear me?”

speaker: narrator
text: Lee Song-Baek silently handed the vial in his hand to him, and as soon as Jin Geum-Ryong took it, he trampled it. The bottle shattered, and the liquid seeped into the ground. Sama Seung was angry, but the response that came back was cold,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Sect leader recently began to distance himself far from Elder Sama. It looks like you are turning old. You are now doing such things in front of everyone, and when you get caUght, you will take the Southern Edge Sect down with you.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “You will not get caUght!!”!

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong stared at the man,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Didn’t you say that even one hit should be repaid back?”

speaker: chung myung
text: “Yes!! Why?!! If you act like thi…”!

speaker: chung myung
text: “Go ahead and use that sword to fight Chung Myung.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong looked angry.

speaker: chung myung
text: “If you want to do it, do it yourself. Even if Elder uses a poisoned sword to attack Chung Myung, I will not stop you. Instead…”

speaker: narrator
text: With a stiff face, he said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “…do not touch my sajae.”

speaker: narrator
text: Sama Seung’s face turned red in anger. However, Jin Geum-Ryong didn’t back down. He just looked at the man straight in his eyes, In the end, the elder backed down and turned around, walking away without looking back. Jin Geum-Ryong, who watched this, mumbled, And looked at Lee Song-Baek,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Don’t think about putting the blame onto Elder.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “A man’s leisure comes from the place he is, and a martial artist’s leisure comes from their martial arts. How many people maintain their sanity when the sect they believed in all their life is shaken?!”

speaker: chung myung
text: “… I wasn’t going to blame…”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong turned and walked as Lee Song-Baek called, Jin geum-Ryong stopped.

speaker: chung myung
text: “Don’t get me wrong.”

speaker: narrator
text: He looked back and snarled,

speaker: chung myung
text: “I cannot stand the sect taking such an absurd route. I will break him down with my own hands, I don’t need your help.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryeong hesitated and said,

speaker: chung myung
text: “But even if I hate you, you are my sajae, and I am your great sahyung. It is my duty to prevent my sajae from going down the wrong path. Whether I like it or not, if you are in danger, I will protect you. That is the mindset you should have as a person who is the oldest of the disciples in the Southern Edge Sect.”

speaker: narrator
text: Jin Geum-Ryong, who glanced at Lee Song-baek, interrupted,

speaker: chung myung
text: “Chung Myung is a wall you cannot overcome.”

speaker: chung myung
text: “So get crushed. I will take revenge for you.”

speaker: narrator
text: ... With that, he walked away, and Lee Song-Baek just continued to watch the man leave and sighed. The person who changed the most was Jin Geum-Ryong. His obsession was frightening to watch, and now even the younger ones didn’t take him seriously. ‘Sahyung is sahyung.’ Lee Song-Baek closed his eyes. ‘Can I bring it back?’ Could this all be changed back to the past? But the answer could be found tomorrow. Return of the Mount Hua Sect
